title: Image Search
description: Search for images by prompts, AI tools, model names, auto tags, and more.

simpleSearch.description: Search in positive prompts and auto tags.
simpleSearch.placeholder: Enter search terms (e.g., girl, masterpiece, hatsune miku)

helpTooltip.searchScope: Search scope: Positive prompts, Auto tags General/Character

results.title: Search Results
results.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or adjust filters.
results.initialMessage: Enter keywords to search for images
results.initialHint: You can search by prompts, AI tools, model names, auto tags, dates, and more.

negativePrompt.label: Negative Prompt
negativePrompt.placeholder: Enter keywords to exclude (e.g., ugly, blurry)

rating.typeDescription: Filter by confidence range of specific rating type
rating.scoreDescription: Filter by weighted total score configured in settings

generalTags.description: Filter by general tags and confidence range

advancedTab.title: Advanced Filter Search
advancedTab.descriptionActive: {{count}} filter(s) active · Execution order: Exclude → OR → AND
advancedTab.descriptionEmpty: Add filters to start advanced searching

validation.filterRequired: Please add at least one filter
validation.scoreRequired: Please set minimum or maximum score

step1.description: Choose how to apply the filter

step2.description: Select what information to search by

step3.description: Configure the condition. Filters cannot be edited after creation, you must delete and recreate them.

exclude.label: Exclude (NOT)
exclude.description: Exclude images matching this condition from results

or.label: OR Group
or.description: Include images matching this condition in results

and.label: AND Group
and.description: Only include images matching all conditions

positive_prompt.label: Positive Prompt
positive_prompt.description: Search positive prompts used in image generation

negative_prompt.label: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.description: Search negative prompts used in image generation

auto_tag.label: Auto Tag (WD Tagger)
auto_tag.description: Search auto-generated tags from WD v3 Tagger

basic.label: Basic Info
basic.description: Search basic metadata like AI tool and model name
